goal.description: The specific goal or focus area this tip addresses — a research question, project goal, learning objective, creative endeavor, or personal pursuit inferred from the user's context.

tip_summary.description: 1-2 sentence executive summary of this tip.

tip_content.description: Full tip body in markdown. Choose and extend any of the following as best fits the user's context: personalized advice, next-step bullet points, links to useful resources, or a copy-paste coding-agent prompt (for opencode, Claude Code, or similar coding agents) that references the user's actual workspace path when known.
